creator: mizhka@FreeBSD.org
text:
Hi,

I would like to confirm that the problem is still present.

Tongle: TP-Link T2U Nano, RTL8821AU
Kernel: FreeBSD 15.0-CURRENT #0 main-n268901-23333b28c8ff

I guess that overheating may be cause of issue. 
Is it possible to gather temp from usb tongle except external sensor?

Thanks!
